message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign center
}

participant halon
participant ios1
participant ios2
participant client

note over ios2
SN$ operation
end note

halon -> ios2 : m0_spiel_repair_abort
destroy ios1
destroy ios2

loop until all IOS are in [IDLE,FAILED]
  halon -> ios2 : repair status request
  ios2 --> halon : repair status reply
end

halon -> client : notify [(pool, PREVIOUS_STATE), (disk, PREVIOUS_STATE)]
@enduml
